title: Build a Tribute Page
description: A tribute page for Dr. Norman Borlaug using semantic HTML and responsive image techniques. The page uses a figure with figcaption for the image, a section for biographical content, and CSS that makes the image responsive with max-width: 100% and height: auto while centering it with display: block and margin: auto.
objectives: Use a main element with an id as the top-level container
Use figure and figcaption to display a captioned image
Use max-width: 100% and height: auto for a responsive image
Center a block image with display: block and margin: 0 auto
Use an anchor with target='_blank' for an external link

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Dr. Norman Borlaug

The man who saved a billion lives

Here's a time line of Dr. Borlaug's life:

  • 1914 - Born in Cresco, Iowa
  • 1933 - Leaves his family's farm to attend the University of Minnesota
  • 1942 - Receives a Ph.D. in Genetics and Plant Pathology
  • 1944 - Flies to Mexico to head a new plant pathology program
  • 1953 - Creates a strain that provides 95% of Mexico's wheat
  • 1970 - Receives the Nobel Peace Prize
  • 2009 - Dies at the age of 95

"Borlaug's life and achievement are testimony to the far-reaching contribution that one man's towering intellect, persistence and scientific vision can make to human peace and progress."

-- Indian Prime Minister Manmohan Singh

Read more about this incredible human being on his Wikipedia entry.
